item.title:
New on the Science Blog: We gave Claude 99 problems analyzing real biological data and compared its performance against an expert panel.
On 23 problems, the experts were stumped. Our most recent mode
item.description:
New on the Science Blog: We gave Claude 99 problems analyzing real biological data and compared its performance against an expert panel.
On 23 problems, the experts were stumped. Our most recent models solved roughly 30% of those—and most of the rest. https://t.co/BYqr76zxhk

item.title: In new Anthropic Fellows research, we discuss “introspection adapters": a tool that allows language models to self-report behaviors they've learned during training—including potential misalignment.
item.description: In new Anthropic Fellows research, we discuss “introspection adapters": a tool that allows language models to self-report behaviors they've learned during training—including potential misalignment.
